revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十八]][[zh:六月十八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十八]][[zh:六月十八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十八]][[zh:六月十八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 18 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月18日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 18일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 18 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十八]][[zh:六月十八]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 18|qq=June 18}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月十八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 18일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 18''' is the 18th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}} . == Events == * Year 6 of {{ill|Genna|en|Genna|qid=Q635245|lt=Genna|1=Genna}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|July 17|en|July 17|qid=Q2729|lt=July 17|1=July 17}} , {{ill|1620|en|1620|qid=Q6810|lt=1620|1=1620}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Masako|en|Tokugawa Masako|qid=Q911334|lt=Tokugawa Masako|1=Tokugawa Masako}} , the fifth daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|qid=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada|1=Tokugawa Hidetada}} , entered the imperial court as a consort (Nyōgo) of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|en|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|qid=Q320229|lt=Emperor Go-Mizunoo|1=Emperor Go-Mizunoo}} . * Year 8 of {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 19|en|July 19|qid=Q2726|lt=July 19|1=July 19}} , {{ill|1723|en|1723|qid=Q6921|lt=1723|1=1723}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q319664}} established the "{{ill|Atataka no Sei|ja|足高の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atataka no Sei|1=tashidakanosei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11637067}} " system for talent recruitment.
== Births == * Year 2 of {{ill|Kōji (Heian period)|en|Kōji (Heian period)|qid=Q1194459|lt=Kōji|1=Kōji (Heian period)}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 31|en|July 31|qid=Q2715|lt=July 31|1=July 31}} , {{ill|1143|en|1143|qid=Q19617|lt=1143|1=1143}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Nijō|en|Emperor Nijō|qid=Q440149|lt=Emperor Nijō|1=Emperor Nijō}} , 78th emperor (d. {{ill|1165|en|1165|qid=Q19676|lt=1165|1=1165}} ) * Year 2 of {{ill|Gentoku|en|Gentoku|qid=Q1327385|lt=Gentoku|1=Gentoku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 4|en|July 4|qid=Q2698|lt=July 4|1=July 4}} , {{ill|1330|en|1330|qid=Q5996|lt=1330|1=1330}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiakira|en|Ashikaga Yoshiakira|qid=Q466321|lt=Ashikaga Yoshiakira|1=Ashikaga Yoshiakira}} , 2nd shogun of the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (d. {{ill|1367|en|1367|qid=Q6202|lt=1367|1=1367}} ) * Year 26 of [[Ōei]]{{efn|July 1394 through April 1428|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 10|en|July 10|qid=Q2689|lt=July 10|1=July 10}} , {{ill|1419|en|1419|qid=Q6205|lt=1419|1=1419}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Hanazono|en|Emperor Go-Hanazono|qid=Q451926|lt=Emperor Go-Hanazono|1=Emperor Go-Hanazono}} , 102nd emperor (d. {{ill|1470|en|1470|qid=Q6569|lt=1470|1=1470}} ) * Year 1 of [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 10|en|July 10|qid=Q2689|lt=July 10|1=July 10}} , {{ill|1789|en|1789|qid=Q7772|lt=1789|1=1789}} ) – {{ill|Yanagawa Seigan|ja|梁川星巌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yanagawa Seigan|1=Yanagawa Seigan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2599311}} , Chinese-style poet (d. {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} ) * Year 8 of {{ill|Tongzhi|ja|同治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tongzhi|1=Tongzhi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1135837}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 26|en|July 26|qid=Q2723|lt=July 26|1=July 26}} , {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} ) – {{ill|Chōmo Hanashiro|en|Chōmo Hanashiro|qid=Q705617|lt=Hanashiro Chōmo|1=Chōmo Hanashiro}} , Ryūkyū Kingdom {{ill|Karate|ja|唐手|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Karate|1=toude|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11418546}} master (d. {{ill|1945|en|1945|qid=Q5240|lt=1945|1=1945}} )
== Deaths == * Year 2 of {{ill|Ōhō|en|Ōhō|qid=Q1193927|lt=Ōhō|1=Ōhō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 31|en|July 31|qid=Q2715|lt=July 31|1=July 31}} , {{ill|1162|en|1162|qid=Q19667|lt=1162|1=1162}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Tadazane|en|Fujiwara no Tadazane|qid=Q718939|lt=Fujiwara no Tadazane|1=Fujiwara no Tadazane}} , Kampaku (Chancellor) (b. {{ill|1078|en|1078|qid=Q19443|lt=1078|1=1078}} )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|17|6|19|5|18|7|6|0618|qq=}}
